title: Math
description: Transforms nether quartz into... blue nether quartz?
body:
![math](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/181badd02ca34157eb6c6f6a57a0eafd5fe1f77a.png)
##

I was bored and decided to transform nether quartz into... math lessons? You know, it's just a bunch of crumpled up paper with many math lessons.

As of January 14, 2026:  
One of the many voices inside my head (my friend) decided to participate in this and also change the color of quartz derivatives 😭🙏

#
### There are two versions of this resourcepack
- Mathematics: Modifies all quartz derivatives (except it's armor trim color) 
- Math: Modifies only the nether quartz crystal
#
### Changes
Both
- Nether Quartz: now it's blue  
  
Mathematics
- Quartz blocks (bricks, pillar, block, smooth block, etc.): now it's blue
- Quartz ore: now it's blue (the part that contains quartz)

#
### Works with any version from 1.13 onwards
#
![m*th: A or E](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe7aadb7195feb85be22fb5af9f75be76f30914_0.webp)

Don't do quartz, it's unhealthy
